commit_scope: Make Form stdlib and BML grammar changes participate in Hostinger production deployment instead of being treated as static-only repository content.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-companion-file-proof.fk
local_validation.notes: Shell syntax checks passed, the Hostinger form deploy path guard passed, focused BML companion proof passed with 33554431, and commit evidence validation passed.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge and Hostinger deploy proof with production SHA parity.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A main push that changes form/form-stdlib, including BML grammar/proof files, triggers Hostinger deploy, routes the change to the API service, carries form/form-stdlib into /app/form/form-stdlib, and no longer treats form/* as static-only.

phase_gate.reason: Deploy-path repair is implemented locally; CI, merge, and production SHA parity are pending.

evidence_refs: The previous BML merge reached main but production health still reported the earlier SHA because deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh classified form/* as static-only and skipped rebuild.
Dockerfile.api now carries form/form-stdlib into the API image at /app/form/form-stdlib.
deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh no longer allows form/* in the static-only fast path.
deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh routes form/form-stdlib/* changes to the api service and syncs form/form-stdlib into the running API container.
scripts/test_hostinger_deploy_form_paths.sh locks this path so the same deployment miss does not repeat silently.
